name: The Quick Change
flavor: A different coat, a different walk, a different name if anyone asks. The performer underneath never changes.
components: Prop (a costume piece or scrap of makeup)
description: You alter your appearance - your face, your clothing, your height and build within a modest range, even your voice - for the duration. You decide the specifics, including whether you resemble a generic member of some race or a specific individual you have seen. A creature that interacts with you can determine you are disguised with a successful Intelligence (Investigation) check against your {{trick save DC|8 + proficiency bonus + your trick ability modifier}}; the disguise otherwise fools sight and casual hearing. The disguise doesn't change any of your game statistics, ends early if you dismiss it (no action required), and ends immediately if you make an attack roll or force a saving throw.
sheetSummary: Action, self, cooldown 1, up to 1 hour. Changes appearance/voice within modest limits; no stat changes. Investigation check vs trick save DC to see through on close interaction. Ends on attack or forcing a save, or if dismissed.
